subject: Gaming
title: Betting and Gambling in Esports
description: A short lesson to help you apply Betting and Gambling in Esports.

hook.text: Esports betting is a billion-dollar market. Much of it operates in legal gray areas.

buildup.text: Traditional sportsbooks now offer odds on esports matches alongside football and basketball.

discovery.text: CS:GO skin gambling let minors bet using virtual items. The underground economy was massive.

twist.text: Match-fixing scandals emerged across multiple games. Players threw matches for gambling payoffs.

climax.text: Regulation is slowly catching up, but esports betting remains loosely policed in most countries.

punchline.text: Billions wagered. Minors gambling skins. Regulation can't keep up.

quiz.question: What problem did CS:GO skin gambling create?
options: It allowed minors to gamble using virtual items in a loosely regulated market
